230101.english: That which was from the beginning, which we have heard, which we have seen with our eyes, which we have looked upon, and our hands have handled, of the Word of life;
230101.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏤᎮᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅᎯ, ᏦᏥᎦᏙᎵ ᏦᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎣᎩᎪᎲᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎦᎧᎿᎭᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏦᎪᏰᏂ ᏦᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎣᎦᏒᏂᎵᏙᎸᎯ, ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏂᏛ^
230101.phonetic: Na-s-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv tse-he-i, a-yv o-ga-dv-ga-nv-hi, tso-tsi-ga-do-li tso-gv-ta-nv-hi o-gi-go-hv-hi, na-s-gi tso-ga-ka-hna-nv-hi, a-le tso-go-ye-ni tso-gv-ta-nv-hi o-ga-sv-ni-li-do-lv-hi, ka-no-he-dv gv-ni-dv^

230102.english: (For the life was manifested, and we have seen it, and bear witness, and shew unto you that eternal life, which was with the Father, and was manifested unto us;)
230102.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏛᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᎪᎲᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᎾᏄᏫᏎᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎡᎲ ᏤᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏲᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ^
230102.phonetic: Gv-ni-dv-ye-no gv-ni-ge-sv nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le o-gi-go-hv-gi, a-le o-tsi-no-he-ha, a-le i-tsv-na-nu-wi-se-ha na-s-gi a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na gv-ni-dv, na-s-gi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i e-hv tse-he-i, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv i-yo-gv-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi^

230103.english: That which we have seen and heard declare we unto you, that ye also may have fellowship with us: and truly our fellowship is with the Father, and with his Son Jesus Christ.
230103.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᎩᎪᎲᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᎾᏄᏫᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᏖᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎣᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎣᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
230103.phonetic: Na-s-gi na o-gi-go-hv-hi a-le o-ga-dv-ga-nv-hi ge-sv i-tsv-na-nu-wi-se-ha, na-s-quo ni-hi i-tsa-te-la-di-s-di-yi o-ga-du-da-de-wi-sv-i; a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya o-ga-du-da-de-wi-sv A-ga-yv-li-ge-i a-le U-we-tsi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

230104.english: And these things write we unto you, that your joy may be full.
230104.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᎤᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
230104.phonetic: Hi-a a-le na-s-gi i-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha i-tsa-li-he-li-gv u-ka-li-i-s-di-yi.

230105.english: This then is the message which we have heard of him, and declare unto you, that God is light, and in him is no darkness at all.
230105.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎣᏣᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏨᎾᏄᏫᏎᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏅ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ ᏄᏪᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230105.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv o-tsa-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi a-le tsi-tsv-na-nu-wi-se-ha na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi i-ga-ga-ti ge-sv-i, a-le u-s-di u-nv-u-li-si-gi nu-we-hv-na ge-sv-i.

230106.english: If we say that we have fellowship with him, and walk in darkness, we lie, and do not the truth:
230106.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᎦᏚᏓᏔ ᏱᏓᏗᎭ, ᎤᎵᏏᎬᏃ ᏱᏕᏙᎭ, ᏱᏓᏥᎪᎥᏍᎦᏉ ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᏗᏍᏓᏩᏕᎦ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230106.phonetic: I-yu-no na-s-gi do-ga-du-da-ta yi-da-di-ha, u-li-si-gv-no yi-de-do-ha, yi-da-tsi-go-v-s-ga-quo a-le v-tla yi-ge-di-s-da-wa-de-ga u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

230107.english: But if we walk in the light, as he is in the light, we have fellowship one with another, and the blood of Jesus Christ his Son cleanseth us from all sin.
230107.cherokee: ᎢᎦᎦᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᏕᏙᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎦᏛᎢ ᏤᎭ, ᏕᎦᏚᏓᏕᏫᏒ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎬ ᎢᎩᏅᎦᎵᎭ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
230107.phonetic: I-ga-ga-dv-s-gi-ni yi-de-do-ha, na-s-gi-ya na-s-gi i-ga-ga-dv-i tse-ha, de-ga-du-da-de-wi-sv i-gv-sv ge-sv-i; a-le u-we-tsi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-gv i-gi-nv-ga-li-ha ni-ga-v i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

230108.english: If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.
230108.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏲᎨᎭ ᏱᏓᏗᎭ, ᎢᎬᏒ ᏱᏓᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᎨᎭ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230108.phonetic: I-yu-no v-tla a-s-ga-ni yo-ge-ha yi-da-di-ha, i-gv-sv yi-da-da-li-da-s-di-ha, a-le v-tla yi-ge-ge-ha u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

230109.english: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just to forgive us our sins, and to cleanse us from all unrighteousness.
230109.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏗᏃᎲᏍᎦ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏅᎦᎸᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏲ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230109.phonetic: I-yu-no yi-di-no-hv-s-ga i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na a-le u-da-nv-ti-yu, na-s-gi i-gi-ne-di-yi i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, a-le i-gi-nv-ga-lv-di-yi ni-ga-v u-yo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-di ge-sv-i.

230110.english: If we say that we have not sinned, we make him a liar, and his word is not in us.
230110.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏲᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏱᏓᏗᎭ, ᎡᏗᏰᎪᎥᏍᎦᏉ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎨᎨᎭ.
230110.phonetic: I-yu-no v-tla yo-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv yi-da-di-ha, e-di-ye-go-v-s-ga-quo, a-le ka-no-he-dv u-tse-li-ga v-tla yi-ge-ge-ha.

230201.english: My little children, these things write I unto you, that ye sin not. And if any man sin, we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous:
230201.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎵ ᏗᏇᏥ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ, ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏯᏍᎦᏅᎦ, ᎢᎨᎭ ᏗᎪᎯᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎡᎲᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ.
230201.phonetic: Di-tsi-yo-li di-que-tsi, hi-a na-s-gi i-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha, i-tsi-s-ga-nv-i-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.  I-yu-no gi-lo ya-s-ga-nv-ga, i-ge-ha di-go-hi-s-da-ne-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge e-hv-i, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv na-s-ga-nv-na.

230202.english: And he is the propitiation for our sins: and not for ours only, but also for the sins of the whole world.
230202.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴᏉ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᎢ.
230202.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-gu-yv-do-di a-yv i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, a-le v-tla a-yv-quo i-gv-sv i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni e-lo-hi ni-gv-na-dv-i.

230203.english: And hereby we do know that we know him, if we keep his commandments.
230203.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᎡᏗᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏗᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
230203.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi i-da-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-ha e-di-ga-ta-hv-i, na-s-gi yi-di-gi-s-qua-ni-go-di tsu-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

230204.english: He that saith, I know him, and keepeth not his commandments, is a liar, and the truth is not in him.
230204.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᏚᏍᏆᏂᎪᏛᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏪᎲᎾ.
230204.phonetic: Gi-lo tsi-ga-ta-ha a-di-s-gi, a-se-no ni-du-s-qua-ni-go-dv-na yi-gi tsu-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, na-s-gi ga-ye-go-gi a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv nu-we-hv-na.

230205.english: But whoso keepeth his word, in him verily is the love of God perfected: hereby know we that we are in him.
230205.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᏳᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᏨᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ:  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᎡᏗᏯᎥᎢ.
230205.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni yu-s-qua-ni-go-di na-s-gi u-ne-tsv-hi, na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ge-yu-di ge-sv u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-so-i:  na-s-gi hi-a i-da-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-ha e-di-ya-v-i.

230206.english: He that saith he abideth in him ought himself also so to walk, even as he walked.
230206.cherokee: ᎩᎶ [ᏥᏌ] ᏥᏯᎠ ᏯᏗᎭ, [ᏥᏌ] ᎤᏪᏙᎸ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏰᏙᎭ.
230206.phonetic: Gi-lo [Tsi-sa] tsi-ya-a ya-di-ha, [Tsi-sa] u-we-do-lv na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ye-do-ha.

230207.english: Brethren, I write no new commandment unto you, but an old commandment which ye had from the beginning. The old commandment is the word which ye have heard from the beginning.
230207.cherokee: ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᏤ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ, ᎤᏪᏘᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᎲᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬᎢ; ᎤᏪᏘ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏁᏣᏛᎩᏍᎪᎢ.
230207.phonetic: I-da-da-nv-tli, v-tla i-tse di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di yi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha, u-we-ti-quo-s-gi-ni di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-s-gi tsi-tsi-hv-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv-i; u-we-ti di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di na-s-gi-quo ka-no-he-dv di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv tsi-ne-tsa-dv-gi-s-go-i.

230208.english: Again, a new commandment I write unto you, which thing is true in him and in you: because the darkness is past, and the true light now shineth.
230208.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ, ᎢᏤ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎭ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᎵᏏᎬᏰᏃ ᎤᎶᏐᏅ, ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᏚᎸᏌᏛ.
230208.phonetic: A-le-wo, i-tse di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha, na-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-ha [Ga-lo-ne-dv] ge-sv-i a-le ni-hi ge-sv-i; u-li-si-gv-ye-no u-lo-so-nv, hna-quo-no du-yu-go-dv i-ga-ga-ti du-lv-sa-dv.

230209.english: He that saith he is in the light, and hateth his brother, is in darkness even until now.
230209.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎨᎠ ᏯᏗᎭ, ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟᏃ ᏯᏍᎦᎦ, ᎤᎵᏏᎬᏉ ᎡᎭ ᎩᎳᎯᏳ.
230209.phonetic: Gi-lo i-ga-ga-dv ge-a ya-di-ha, di-na-da-nv-tli-no ya-s-ga-ga, u-li-si-gv-quo e-ha gi-la-hi-yu.

230210.english: He that loveth his brother abideth in the light, and there is none occasion of stumbling in him.
230210.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᏳᎨᏳᎭ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎡᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏙᏕᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏳᏪᎭ.
230210.phonetic: Gi-lo di-na-da-nv-tli yu-ge-yu-ha i-ga-ga-dv e-ha, v-tla a-le go-hu-s-di a-da-do-de-s-di-s-gi yu-we-ha.

230211.english: But he that hateth his brother is in darkness, and walketh in darkness, and knoweth not whither he goeth, because that darkness hath blinded his eyes.
230211.cherokee: ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏍᎦᎩ ᎤᎵᏏᎬᏉ ᎡᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏏᎬᏉ ᎡᏙᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏯᎦᏔᎭ ᏩᎦᏛᎢ, ᎤᎵᏏᎬᏰᏃ ᏚᎨᏩᏛ.
230211.phonetic: Di-na-da-nv-tli-s-gi-ni a-s-ga-gi u-li-si-gv-quo e-ha, a-le u-li-si-gv-quo e-do-ha, v-tla a-le ya-ga-ta-ha wa-ga-dv-i, u-li-si-gv-ye-no du-ge-wa-dv.

230212.english: I write unto you, little children, because your sins are forgiven you for his name's sake.
230212.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᏗᏥᏲᎵ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᏰᏃ ᎡᏥᏙᎵᏨ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᏥᏌ ᏕᎤᏙᎥᎢ.
230212.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha di-tsi-yo-li i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-ye-no e-tsi-do-li-tsv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv Tsi-sa de-u-do-v-i.

230213.english: I write unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I write unto you, young men, because ye have overcome the wicked one. I write unto you, little children, because ye have known the Father.
230213.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᎢᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒᏰᏃ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏤᎭ.  ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᎢᏥᏫᏅ, ᎡᏥᏎᎪᎩᏒᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ.  ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᏗᏥᏲᎵ, ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒᏰᏃ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
230213.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha i-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i, e-tsi-ga-do-v-sv-ye-no di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv tse-ha.  I-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha i-tsi-wi-nv, e-tsi-se-go-gi-sv-ye-no u-ne-gu-tsi-dv.  I-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha di-tsi-yo-li, e-tsi-ga-do-v-sv-ye-no A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

230214.english: I have written unto you, fathers, because ye have known him that is from the beginning. I have written unto you, young men, because ye are strong, and the word of God abideth in you, and ye have overcome the wicked one.
230214.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏥᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎡᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒᏰᏃ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏤᎭ.  ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏥᏫᏅ, ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏰᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏥᏯᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᏎᎪᎩᏒ ᎤᏁᏧᏥᏛ.
230214.phonetic: I-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsi-ga-yv-li-ge-i, e-tsi-ga-do-v-sv-ye-no di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv tse-ha.  I-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tsi-wi-nv, di-tsa-li-ni-gi-di-yu-ye-no, a-le ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga i-tsi-ya-a, a-le e-tsi-se-go-gi-sv u-ne-tsu-tsi-dv.

230215.english: Love not the world, neither the things that are in the world. If any man love the world, the love of the Father is not in him.
230215.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏳᎨᏳᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎬᏩᎨᏳᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
230215.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-tsi-ge-yu-se-s-di e-lo-hi, a-le go-hu-s-di e-lo-hi e-hi.  I-yu-no gi-lo e-lo-hi yu-ge-yu-ha, v-tla yi-gv-wa-ge-yu-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

230216.english: For all that is in the world, the lust of the flesh, and the lust of the eyes, and the pride of life, is not of the Father, but is of the world.
230216.cherokee: ᏥᏄᏓᎴᏰᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏤᎭ, ᎠᏰᎸ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏨᎦᏙᎵ ᎤᏙᎸᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏢᏉᏗ ᎠᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᏛᏱ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎡᎶᎯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
230216.phonetic: Tsi-nu-da-le-ye-no e-lo-hi tse-ha, a-ye-lv u-du-lv-di tsi-gi, a-le tsv-ga-do-li u-do-lv-di tsi-gi, a-le a-tlv-quo-di a-le-ni-da-s-di-yi, na-s-gi v-tla A-ga-yv-li-ge-s-dv-yi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi yi-gi, e-lo-hi-quo-s-gi-ni u-da-le-nv-hi.

230217.english: And the world passeth away, and the lust thereof: but he that doeth the will of God abideth for ever.
230217.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎦᎶᏐᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎡᎭ.
230217.phonetic: A-le e-lo-hi ga-lo-so-hv-s-ga, a-le na-s-gi na-hna a-du-lv-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ni-go-hi-lv e-ha.

230218.english: Little children, it is the last time: and as ye have heard that antichrist shall come, even now are there many antichrists; whereby we know that it is the last time.
230218.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎵ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ, ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ-ᎠᏡᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏣᏔ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ-ᎠᎾᏡᏗᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230218.phonetic: di-tsi-yo-li, hna-quo u-li-s-qua-lv-di, i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi-no tsi-gi u-lu-hi-s-di-yi ga-lo-ne-dv--a-tlu-di-s-gi, a-le go-hi ge-sv u-ni-tsa-ta ga-lo-ne-dv--a-na-tlu-di-s-gi; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-di-ga-ta-ha u-li-s-qua-lv-di ge-sv-i.

230219.english: They went out from us, but they were not of us; for if they had been of us, they would no doubt have continued with us: but they went out, that they might be made manifest that they were not all of us.
230219.cherokee: ᎨᎦᏙᏣᎳᎡᎸᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᎳ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᎠᏁᏔ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᏱᏂᎬᏩᎾᏛᏁᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ [ᎤᎾᏙᏣᎴᏒᎩ] ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᏂᎦᏛ ᎠᏁᎳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230219.phonetic: Ge-ga-do-tsa-la-e-lv-gi, a-se-no v-tla na-hna a-ne-la yi-ge-se-i, i-yu-ye-no na-hna a-ne-ta yi-ge-se-i, a-se yi-ni-gv-wa-na-dv-ne-i, a-se-no [u-na-do-tsa-le-sv-gi] gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-na-li-s-do-di-yi na-hna ni-ga-dv a-ne-la ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

230220.english: But ye have an unction from the Holy One, and ye know all things.
230220.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᏥᎶᏁᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᏂᎦᎥᎢ.
230220.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni na-s-ga-nv-na i-tsi-lo-ne-v, a-le i-tsi-ga-ta-hi-yu ni-ga-v-i.

230221.english: I have not written unto you because ye know not the truth, but because ye know it, and that no lie is of the truth.
230221.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᏥᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230221.phonetic: Hi-a tsi-tsv-yo-we-la-si v-tla yi-nv-da-ga-li-s-do-da ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na ge-sv du-yu-go-dv-i, i-tsi-ga-ta-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ge-sv-i, a-le i-tsi-ga-ta-hi-yu ge-sv ni-ga-v ga-ye-go-gi ka-no-he-dv du-yu-go-dv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

230222.english: Who is a liar but he that denieth that Jesus is the Christ? He is antichrist, that denieth the Father and the Son.
230222.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏱᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎶᏁᏛᎠᏡᏗᏍᎩ, ᎠᏓᏱᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᏥ.
230222.phonetic: Ga-go ga-ye-go-gi, i-yu-no na-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi na a-da-yi-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv-i.  Na-s-gi na ga-lo-ne-dv-a-tlu-di-s-gi, a-da-yi-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i a-le U-we-tsi.

230223.english: Whosoever denieth the Son, the same hath not the Father: (but) he that acknowledgeth the Son hath the Father also.
230223.cherokee: ᎩᎶ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏓᏱᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏪᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ; [ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎭ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.]
230223.phonetic: Gi-lo [U-ne-la-nv-hi] U-we-tsi a-da-yi-hi, na-s-gi v-tla yu-we-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge-i; [na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi u-we-tsi na-s-gi u-we-ha na-s-quo A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.]

230224.english: Let that therefore abide in you, which ye have heard from the beginning. If that which ye have heard from the beginning shall remain in you, ye also shall continue in the Son, and in the Father.
230224.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ ᎢᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎡᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ.
230224.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha na-s-gi ni-hi i-tsi-ya-e-s-di.  I-yu-no na-s-gi di-da-le-ni-s-gv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha i-tsi-ya-e-s-di, ni-hi na-s-quo e-tsi-ya-e-s-di U-we-tsi a-le A-ga-yv-li-ge-i.

230225.english: And this is the promise that he hath promised us, even eternal life.
230225.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ.
230225.phonetic: A-le hi-a na-s-gi i-gi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na gv-ni-dv.

230226.english: These things have I written unto you concerning them that seduce you.
230226.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎦᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏥᎵᏓᏍᏗᏍᎩ.
230226.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-yo-we-la-si ga-tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-gv na-s-gi na ge-tsi-li-da-s-di-s-gi.

230227.english: But the anointing which ye have received of him abideth in you, and ye need not that any man teach you: but as the same anointing teacheth you of all things, and is truth, and is no lie, and even as it hath taught you, ye shall abide in him.
230227.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏥᎶᏁᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏥᏯᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏤᏲᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎢᏥᎶᏁᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᏤᏲᎲᏍᎦ ᏂᎦᎥᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏤᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎡᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ.
230227.phonetic: Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni Tsi-sa i-tsi-lo-ne-ta-nv-hi ge-sv tsi-tsi-ya-a, a-le u-du-lv-di ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-hv-na tsi-gi gi-lo i-tse-yo-di-yi, na-s-gi-ye-no Tsi-sa i-tsi-lo-ne-ta-nv-hi tsi-tse-yo-hv-s-ga ni-ga-v-i, a-le u-do-hi-yu-sv tsi-gi, a-le ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv i-tse-yo-hv-s-gv e-tsi-ya-e-s-di.

230228.english: And now, little children, abide in him; that, when he shall appear, we may have confidence, and not be ashamed before him at his coming.
230228.cherokee: Ꭷ, ᏗᏥᏲᎵ, ᏥᏌ ᎡᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸᎭ ᏂᏗᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏓᏕᎰᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎷᏥᎸᎭ.
230228.phonetic: Ka, di-tsi-yo-li, Tsi-sa e-tsi-ya-e-s-di, na-s-gi-no na-hi-yu ga-na-nu-go-tsi-lv-ha ni-di-na-ye-s-gv-na ge-se-s-di a-le ni-da-de-ho-s-gv-na ge-se-s-di a-ga-ta-hv-i na-hi-yu ga-lu-tsi-lv-ha.

230229.english: If ye know that he is righteous, ye know that every one that doeth righteousness is born of him.
230229.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ [ᎾᏍᏉ] ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230229.phonetic: I-yu-no yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-ga-nv-na ge-sv Tsi-sa, i-tsi-ga-ta-ha [na-s-quo] na-ni-v du-yu-go-dv tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi na-s-gi tsu-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ge-sv-i.

230301.english: Behold, what manner of love the Father hath bestowed upon us, that we should be called the sons of God: therefore the world knoweth us not, because it knew him not.
230301.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏄᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᎢᎩᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎦᏰᎪᏎᏗ ᏥᎩ.  ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏒᎩ.
230301.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo nu-s-qua-ni-go-di a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv A-ga-yv-li-ge i-gi-ne-lv, na-s-gi u-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi ga-ye-go-se-di tsi-gi.  E-lo-hi a-yv ni-gi-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-gi, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi nu-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-ge-sv-gi.

230302.english: Beloved, now are we the sons of God, and it doth not yet appear what we shall be: but we know that, when he shall appear, we shall be like him; for we shall see him as he is.
230302.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎠᏴ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏏ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏨᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏂᎦᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏰᏗᎪᎢ.
230302.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, hna-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi a-yv, a-se-no v-tla a-si gv-ni-ge-sv yi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha i-ga-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i; a-se-no i-di-ga-ta-ha na-hi-yu ga-na-nu-go-tsv-ha na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv ni-ga-s-de-s-di, na-s-gi-ye-no nu-s-dv na-s-gi da-ye-di-go-i.

230303.english: And every man that hath this hope in him purifieth himself, even as he is pure.
230303.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏍᏙ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏧᏩᏐ [ᏥᏌ], ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᎦᎵᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᏥᏌ] ᏄᏅᎦᎸᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏓᏛᏁᎰᎢ.
230303.phonetic: Gi-lo-no na-s-gi hi-a tsi-nu-s-do u-du-gi tsu-wa-so [Tsi-sa], u-wa-sv a-da-nv-ga-li-s-go-i, na-s-gi-ya [tsi-sa] nu-nv-ga-lv-na tsi-gi na-s-gi-ya na-da-dv-ne-ho-i.

230304.english: Whosoever committeth sin transgresseth also the law: for sin is the transgression of the law.
230304.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏣᏍᎦᏅᎪ ᎠᏲᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎠᏍᎦᏂᏰᏃ ᎠᏲᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
230304.phonetic: Gi-lo tsa-s-ga-nv-go a-yo-s-di-s-go na-s-quo di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, a-s-ga-ni-ye-no a-yo-s-di-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

230305.english: And ye know that he was manifested to take away our sins; and in him is no sin.
230305.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ ᎢᎩᎲᎡᏗᏱ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ; ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏪᎭ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ.
230305.phonetic: A-le i-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-lv i-gi-hv-e-di-yi i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i; u-wa-sv-s-gi-ni v-tla yu-we-ha a-s-ga-ni.

230306.english: Whosoever abideth in him sinneth not: whosoever sinneth hath not seen him, neither known him.
230306.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏣᏯᎣ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏱ] ᎥᏝ ᏯᏍᎦᏅᎪᎢ; ᎩᎶ ᏣᏍᎦᏅᎪᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ.
230306.phonetic: Gi-lo tsa-ya-o [Ga-lo-ne-dv-yi] v-tla ya-s-ga-nv-go-i; gi-lo tsa-s-ga-nv-go-i v-tla u-go-hv-hi yi-ge-so-i, v-tla a-le u-ga-do-v-sv-hi yi-ge-so-i.

230307.english: Little children, let no man deceive you: he that doeth righteousness is righteous, even as he is righteous.
230307.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎵ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏥᎶᏄᎮᎴᏍᏗ; ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ [ᎦᎶᏁᏛ] ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏥᎩ.
230307.phonetic: Di-tsi-yo-li tle-s-di gi-lo yi-tsi-lo-nu-he-le-s-di; du-yu-go-dv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi na-s-gi na-s-ga-nv-na, na-s-gi-ya [Ga-lo-ne-dv] na-s-ga-nv-na tsi-gi.

230308.english: He that committeth sin is of the devil; for the devil sinneth from the beginning. For this purpose the Son of God was manifested, that he might destroy the works of the devil.
230308.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎪᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎬᏁᎸᎩ, ᎤᏲᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
230308.phonetic: A-s-ga-ni tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-s-gi-na nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-so-i, di-da-le-ni-s-gv-ye-no nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv a-s-gi-na a-s-ga-nv-go-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi gv-ni-ge-sv na-gv-ne-lv-gi, u-yo-s-do-di-yi a-s-gi-na du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

230309.english: Whosoever is born of God doth not commit sin; for his seed remaineth in him: and he cannot sin, because he is born of God.
230309.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᏱᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᎦᏔ ᎤᏪᎰᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230309.phonetic: Gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-de-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-so v-tla a-s-ga-ni yi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i; na-s-gi-ye-no u-tse-li-ga u-ga-ta u-we-ho-i, v-tla a-le ye-li gv-wa-s-ga-nv-i-s-di yi-ge-so-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go U-ne-la-nv-hi u-de-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

230310.english: In this the children of God are manifest, and the children of the devil: whosoever doeth not righteousness is not of God, neither he that loveth not his brother.
230310.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎾᎾᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᏧᏪᏥ; ᎩᎶ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎤᎨᏳᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ.
230310.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi na-hna U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi gv-ni-ge-sv na-na-li-s-di-ha, a-le a-s-gi-na tsu-we-tsi; gi-lo du-yu-go-dv tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-so-i, v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi yi-ge-so-i; a-le di-na-da-nv-tli u-ge-yu-hi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-so-i.

230311.english: For this is the message that ye heard from the beginning, that we should love one another.
230311.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏥᏣᏛᎩᎭ ᏗᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᏂᎨᏣᏛᎩᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᏓᎨᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
230311.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi ka-no-he-dv tsi-tsa-dv-gi-ha di-da-le-ni-s-gv ni-ge-tsa-dv-gi-s-go-i, na-s-gi di-ga-da-ge-yu-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

230312.english: Not as Cain, who was of that wicked one, and slew his brother. And wherefore slew he him? Because his own works were evil, and his brother's righteous.
230312.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎾ ᏄᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏟ ᏧᎴ.  ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎤᎴᎢ?  ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏅᏟᏃ ᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230312.phonetic: V-tla na-s-gi ge-na nu-dv-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi u-ne-gu-tsi-dv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi tsi-ge-se-i, a-le u-nv-tli tsu-le.  Ga-do-no i-u-le-i?  Nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-gi-ni u-wa-sv du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv u-yo-i-yu ge-sv-i, u-nv-tli-no du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv o-si-yu ge-sv-i.

230313.english: Marvel not, my brethren, if the world hate you.
230313.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᎩᏳ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
230313.phonetic: Tle-s-di yi-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-s-ge-s-di, i-da-da-nv-tli, i-yu-no e-lo-hi i-gi-s-ga-gi-yu i-ge-se-s-di.

230314.english: We know that we have passed from death unto life, because we love the brethren. He that loveth not his brother abideth in death.
230314.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᎶᏒᎢ ᎬᏂᏛᏃ ᏫᎩᎾᏄᎪᏨᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏗᏗᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ.  ᎩᎶ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ, ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎭ.
230314.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv i-gi-lo-sv-i gv-ni-dv-no wi-gi-na-nu-go-tsv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha di-di-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv i-da-da-nv-tli.  Gi-lo u-ge-yu-hi-yu ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi di-na-da-nv-tli, a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv e-ha.

230315.english: Whosoever hateth his brother is a murderer: and ye know that no murderer hath eternal life abiding in him.
230315.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎠᏍᎦᎩ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎯᎯ; ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎯᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏄᏪᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230315.phonetic: Gi-lo di-na-da-nv-tli a-s-ga-gi yi-gi na-s-gi yv-wi a-hi-hi; i-tsi-ga-ta-ha-no yv-wi a-hi-hi gv-ni-dv nu-we-hv-na ge-sv-i.

230316.english: Hereby perceive we the love of God, because he laid down his life for us: and we ought to lay down our lives for the brethren.
230316.cherokee: ᎠᏂ ᎢᏗᎪ ᏩᏘᎭ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎬᏅ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏕᏛᏅ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏱᏗᏗᏁᎭ ᎢᏓᏓᏅᏟ.
230316.phonetic: A-ni i-di-go wa-ti-ha u-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha gv-nv e-la-di i-gi-ne-lv-i, a-le na-s-quo a-yv de-dv-nv e-la-di yi-di-di-ne-ha i-da-da-nv-tli.

230317.english: But whoso hath this world's good, and seeth his brother have need, and shutteth up his bowels of compassion from him, how dwelleth the love of God in him?
230317.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏪᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎪᏩᏘᏍᎪ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎤᏂᎬᎬᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏣᏍᏚᏁᎰᏉ ᎤᎾᏫ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᏳᏪᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
230317.phonetic: Gi-lo-s-gi-ni e-lo-hi e-hi a-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv tsu-we-ho-i, a-le tsa-go-wa-ti-s-go di-na-da-nv-tli u-ni-gv-gv-i, a-se-no na-s-gi tsa-s-du-ne-ho-quo u-na-wi, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da yu-we-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i?

230318.english: My little children, let us not love in word, neither in tongue; but in deed and in truth.
230318.cherokee: ᏗᏥᏲᎵ ᏗᏇᏥ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏗᏁᎬᏉ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏗᏃᎪᎢᏉ ᏱᏗᏛᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏱᎦᏓᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ, ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
230318.phonetic: Di-tsi-yo-li di-que-tsi, tle-s-di i-di-ne-gv-quo a-le di-di-no-go-i-quo yi-di-dv-di-s-ge-s-di yi-ga-da-ge-yu-se-s-di, de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-s-gi-ni a-le u-do-hi-yu-sv-i.

230319.english: And hereby we know that we are of the truth, and shall assure our hearts before him.
230319.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏅᏓᎦᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏙᎯᏱᏃ ᏂᏙᏓᏛᏁᎵ ᏗᎩᎾᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
230319.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a i-da-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-ha du-yu-go-dv nv-da-ga-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv-i; do-hi-yi-no ni-do-da-dv-ne-li di-gi-na-wi na-s-gi a-ga-ta-hv-i.

230320.english: For if our heart condemn us, God is greater than our heart, and knoweth all things.
230320.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏗᎩᎾᏫ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏱᏗᎫᎪᏗᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏗᎩᎾᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎯᏳ ᏂᎦᎥᎢ.
230320.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no di-gi-na-wi i-gi-s-ga-nv-tsv yi-di-gu-go-di-ha, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo di-gi-na-wi, a-le a-ga-ta-hi-yu ni-ga-v-i.

230321.english: Beloved, if our heart condemn us not, then have we confidence toward God.
230321.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᎩᎾᏫ ᏂᏗᎫᎪᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗᏳ ᎢᎦᏓᏅᏔ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏓᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ;
230321.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, i-yu-no di-gi-na-wi ni-di-gu-go-da-ne-hv-na yi-gi, u-ga-li-s-di-yu i-ga-da-nv-ta u-ne-la-nv-hi e-da-da-nv-te-s-gv-i;

230322.english: And whatsoever we ask, we receive of him, because we keep his commandments, and do those things that are pleasing in his sight.
230322.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏗᏔᏲᎭ ᎢᎩᏁᎰᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪ ᎢᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏓᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᎩᎧᏅᎢ.
230322.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di i-di-ta-yo-ha i-gi-ne-ho-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go i-gi-s-qua-ni-go-dv u-tse-li-ga di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, a-le de-gi-lv-wi-da-ne-hv na-s-gi o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di ge-sv de-gi-ka-nv-i.

230323.english: And this is his commandment, That we should believe on the name of his Son Jesus Christ, and love one another, as he gave us commandment.
230323.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎢᎪᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏕᎤᏙᎥ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏓᎨᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎩᏁᏤᎸᎢ.
230323.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-s-di u-tse-li-ga di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, i-go-hi-yu-di-yi de-u-do-v U-we-tsi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le di-ga-da-ge-yu-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi-ya i-gi-ne-tse-lv-i.

230324.english: And he that keepeth his commandments dwelleth in him, and he in him. And hereby we know that he abideth in us, by the Spirit which he hath given us.
230324.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏯᎣᎢ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ], ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏯᎣᎢ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ].  ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏯᎥᎢ.
230324.phonetic: Gi-lo-no na-s-gi u-tse-li-ga di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di a-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-gi na-s-gi a-ya-o-i [U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi], a-le na-s-gi u-ya-o-i [U-ne-la-nv-hi].  A-le a-da-nv-do i-gi-ne-lv-hi ge-sv na-s-gi i-da-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-ha a-yv i-gi-ya-v-i.

230401.english: Beloved, believe not every spirit, but try the spirits whether they are of God: because many false prophets are gone out into the world.
230401.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ ᏱᏗᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏕᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳ ᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎤᏂᏣᏔᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᏙᎭ ᎡᎶᎯ.
230401.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, tle-s-di na-ni-v di-da-nv-do yi-di-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di, de-tsi-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni di-da-nv-do, U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu da-le-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.  U-ni-tsa-ta-ye-no u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi a-ne-do-ha e-lo-hi.

230402.english: Hereby know ye the Spirit of God: Every spirit that confesseth that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is of God:
230402.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏍᎩ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏥᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
230402.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-di i-tso-li-s-do-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li A-da-nv-do; na-s-gi a-da-nv-do hi-a i-ga-we-s-gi, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-que-da-li u-na-nu-go-tsi-le-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

230403.english: And every spirit that confesseth not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh is not of God: and this is that spirit of antichrist, whereof ye have heard that it should come; and even now already is it in the world.
230403.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏥᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ-ᎠᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏣᏛᎦᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎭ.
230403.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-da-nv-do hi-a i-ga-we-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-que-da-li u-na-nu-go-tsi-le-i, v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi yi-gi.  Na-s-gi-s-gi-ni hi-a ga-lo-ne-dv--a-tlu-di-s-gi u-tse-li-ga a-da-nv-do, na-s-gi u-lu-hi-s-di-yi i-tsa-dv-ga-nv-hi tsi-gi, a-le hna-quo ga-yu-la e-lo-hi e-ha.

230404.english: Ye are of God, little children, and have overcome them: because greater is he that is in you, than he that is in the world.
230404.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏣᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᏗᏥᏲᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏎᎪᎩᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏟ ᎤᎵᏂᏗᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏯᎢ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏯᎢ.
230404.phonetic: Ni-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-tsa-da-le-nv-hi, di-tsi-yo-li, a-le de-tsi-se-go-gi-sv na-s-gi; nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-tli u-li-ni-di-gi-di-yu ge-sv i-tsi-ya-i e-s-ga-quo e-lo-hi a-ya-i.

230405.english: They are of the world: therefore speak they of the world, and the world heareth them.
230405.cherokee: ᎡᎶᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎰᎢ.
230405.phonetic: E-lo-hi nv-da-yu-na-da-le-nv-hi na-s-gi, na-s-gi i-yu-s-di e-lo-hi e-hi a-ni-wo-ni-ha, a-le e-lo-hi u-na-dv-ga-ne-ho-i.

230406.english: We are of God: he that knoweth God heareth us; he that is not of God heareth not us. Hereby know we the spirit of truth, and the spirit of error.
230406.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏲᎦᏓᎴᏅᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎯ ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏁᎰᎢ.  ᎾᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎥᏝ ᏲᎦᏛᎦᏁᎰᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏕᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᎾᏛᏁᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏯᏌᏛᏁᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏗᏓᏅᏙ.
230406.phonetic: A-yv U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yo-ga-da-le-nv-hi; na-s-gi na U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hi o-ga-dv-ga-ne-ho-i.  Na-no U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na v-tla yo-ga-dv-ga-ne-ho-i.  Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha de-di-ga-ta-ha du-yu-go-dv i-ya-na-dv-ne-hi a-da-nv-do, a-le du-yu-go-dv i-ya-sa-dv-ne-hi ni-ge-sv-na di-da-nv-do.

230407.english: Beloved, let us love one another: for love is of God; and every one that loveth is born of God, and knoweth God.
230407.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏕᎦᏓᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᏧᏓᎨᏳᏐ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
230407.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, de-ga-da-ge-yu-se-s-di; a-da-ge-yu-di-ye-no ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi, gi-lo-no tsu-da-ge-yu-so U-ne-la-nv-hi u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi ge-so-i, a-le a-ga-ta-ho U-ne-la-nv-hi.

230408.english: He that loveth not knoweth not God; for God is love.
230408.cherokee: ᎤᏓᎨᏳᎯᏃ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎥᏝ ᏯᎦᏔᎰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏙᎥ.
230408.phonetic: U-da-ge-yu-hi-no ni-ge-sv-na, v-tla ya-ga-ta-ho U-ne-la-nv-hi; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv du-do-v.

230409.english: In this was manifested the love of God toward us, because that God sent his only begotten Son into the world, that we might live through him.
230409.cherokee: ᎠᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏧᏅᏎ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ ᎤᏕᏁᎸᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᎩᏩᏛᏗᏱ.
230409.phonetic: A-ni hi-a gv-ni-ge-sv nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi i-gi-ge-yu-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no tsu-nv-se u-wa-sv-hi-yu u-de-ne-lv-hi U-we-tsi e-lo-hi u-lu-hi-s-di-yi, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi gv-ni-dv i-gi-wa-dv-di-yi.

230410.english: Herein is love, not that we loved God, but that he loved us, and sent his Son to be the propitiation for our sins.
230410.cherokee: ᎠᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏗᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏅᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᎫᏴᏙᏗ ᎢᎩᏍᎦᏍᏨᎢ.
230410.phonetic: A-ni hi-a a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, v-tla U-ne-la-nv-hi e-di-ge-yu-i-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv-i, a-yv-s-gi-ni i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv-i, a-le tsu-nv-sv u-tse-li-ga U-we-tsi a-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi a-gu-yv-do-di i-gi-s-ga-s-tsv-i.

230411.english: Beloved, if God so loved us, we ought also to love one another.
230411.cherokee: ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᎦᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏱᎩ.
230411.phonetic: I-tsv-ge-yu-i, i-yu-no U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi i-ga-i i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu i-yu-li-s-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, a-yv na-s-quo di-ga-da-ge-yu-hi-yu yi-gi.

230412.english: No man hath seen God at any time. If we love one another, God dwelleth in us, and his love is perfected in us.
230412.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᏱᎩ.  ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᎦᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏯᎠ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎡᏗᎨᏳᏒ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏐᎢ.
230412.phonetic: V-tla i-lv-hi-yu gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-go-hv-hi yi-gi.  I-yu-no di-ga-da-ge-yu-hi-yu yi-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi i-gi-ya-a, a-le a-yv e-di-ge-yu-sv u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-so-i.

230413.english: Hereby know we that we dwell in him, and he in us, because he hath given us of his Spirit.
230413.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᎭ ᎡᏗᏯᎥᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᏯᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ.
230413.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi i-da-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-ha e-di-ya-v-i a-le a-yv i-gi-ya-v-i, na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv i-ga-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv u-wa-sv u-tse-li A-da-nv-do.

230414.english: And we have seen and do testify that the Father sent the Son to be the Saviour of the world.
230414.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎩᎪᎲ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᏃᎮᎭ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏧᏅᏒ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
230414.phonetic: A-le a-yv o-gi-go-hv a-le o-tsi-no-he-ha A-ga-yv-li-ge tsu-nv-sv U-we-tsi e-lo-hi A-s-de-li-s-gi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

230415.english: Whosoever shall confess that Jesus is the Son of God, God dwelleth in him, and he in God.
230415.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏪᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏯᎣᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᎠᏯᎣᎢ.
230415.phonetic: Gi-lo hi-a i-ga-we-s-gi Tsi-sa U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi o-ya-o-i, a-le na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi a-ya-o-i.

230416.english: And we have known and believed the love that God hath to us. God is love; and he that dwelleth in love dwelleth in God, and God in him.
230416.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎩᎦᏙᎥᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎢᎪᎯᏳᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏙᎥ, ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎾᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏯᎣᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏯᎣᎢ.
230416.phonetic: A-le a-yv i-gi-ga-do-v-sv a-le i-go-hi-yu-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i.  U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv du-do-v, a-da-ge-yu-di-no ge-sv e-hi U-na-la-nv-hi a-ya-o-i, a-le U-na-la-nv-hi na-s-gi u-ya-o-i.

230417.english: Herein is our love made perfect, that we may have boldness in the day of judgment: because as he is, so are we in this world.
230417.cherokee: ᎠᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎢᎦᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ, ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏗᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᎫᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ.
230417.phonetic: A-ni hi-a i-ga-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv u-ka-li-tsv-hi, nu-li-s-ta-nv na-s-gi ni-di-na-ye-s-gv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi di-gu-go-do-di-yi i-ga ge-se-s-di, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv na-s-quo na-s-gi ni-ga-s-di a-yv a-ni e-lo-hi.

230418.english: There is no fear in love; but perfect love casteth out fear: because fear hath torment. He that feareth is not made perfect in love.
230418.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏳᏓᏑᏯ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎦᏄᎪᏫᏍᎦ ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎦᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎤᏪᎭ; ᎩᎶ ᏥᎦᎾᏰᏍᎪᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᏱᎨᏐ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230418.phonetic: V-tla ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv yu-da-su-ya a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, u-ka-li-tsv-hi-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-da-ge-yu-di ga-nu-go-wi-s-ga ga-na-ye-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; ga-na-ye-hi-s-di-ye-no ge-sv a-gi-li-ya u-we-ha; gi-lo tsi-ga-na-ye-s-go-i v-tla u-ka-li-tsv-hi yi-ge-so a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i.

230419.english: We love him, because he first loved us.
230419.cherokee: ᎡᏗᎨᏳᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎢᎩᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
230419.phonetic: E-di-ge-yu-a na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha a-yv i-gv-yi i-gi-ge-yu-hi-yu nu-li-s-ta-nv-i.

230420.english: If a man say, I love God, and hateth his brother, he is a liar: for he that loveth not his brother whom he hath seen, how can he love God whom he hath not seen?
230420.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏳᎠ ᏯᏗᎭ, ᏯᏍᎦᎦᏃ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ, ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ, ᎦᏙ ᏱᎦᎵᏍᏙᏓ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎪᎲᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230420.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-ge-yu-a ya-di-ha, ya-s-ga-ga-no di-na-da-nv-tli, ga-ye-go-gi na-s-gi, u-ge-yu-hi-ye-no ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi di-na-da-nv-tli na-s-gi u-go-hv-hi, ga-do yi-ga-li-s-do-da u-ge-yu-hi-yu yi-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-go-hv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

230421.english: And this commandment have we from him, That he who loveth God love his brother also.
230421.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ.
230421.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di i-gi-ne-lv-hi, na-s-gi i-yu-no gi-lo u-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-quo u-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-se-s-di di-na-da-nv-tli.

230501.english: Whosoever believeth that Jesus is the Christ is born of God: and every one that loveth him that begat loveth him also that is begotten of him.
230501.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏱᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ, ᎩᎶᏃ ᏳᎨᏳᎭ ᎤᏓᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏥᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᎤᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏐᎢ.
230501.phonetic: Gi-lo yi-go-hi-yu-hv-s-ga Tsi-sa na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-de-ta-nv-hi, gi-lo-no yu-ge-yu-ha u-da-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi, na-s-quo a-tsi-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi u-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-so-i.

230502.english: By this we know that we love the children of God, when we love God, and keep his commandments.
230502.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏗᎨᏳᎢ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏓᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎨᏗᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏪᏥ.
230502.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi e-di-ge-yu-i tsi-ge-so-i, a-le tsi-gi-s-qua-ni-go-do u-tse-li-ga di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di, na-s-gi i-da-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-s-go ge-di-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-we-tsi.

230503.english: For this is the love of God, that we keep his commandments: and his commandments are not grievous.
230503.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ; ᎤᏤᎵᏃ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎦᎨᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ.
230503.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a nu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ge-yu-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi di-gi-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi tsu-tse-li di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di; u-tse-li-no di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di v-tla ga-ge-di-yu yi-gi.

230504.english: For whatsoever is born of God overcometh the world: and this is the victory that overcometh the world, even our faith.
230504.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏎᎪᎩᏍᎪ ᎡᎶᎯ.  ᎢᎪᎯᏳᏒᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎᎪᎩᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ.
230504.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-ye-no go-hu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-de-ta-nv-hi a-se-go-gi-s-go e-lo-hi.  I-go-hi-yu-sv-no na-s-gi a-se-go-gi-s-gi e-lo-hi.

230505.english: Who is he that overcometh the world, but he that believeth that Jesus is the Son of God?
230505.cherokee: ᎦᎪ Ꮎ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎠᏎᎪᎩᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎨᏒᎢ?
230505.phonetic: Ga-go na e-lo-hi a-se-go-gi-s-gi i-yu-no na-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi na-s-gi na go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi Tsi-sa U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi ge-sv-i?

230506.english: This is he that came by water and blood, even Jesus Christ; not by water only, but by water and blood. And it is the Spirit that beareth witness, because the Spirit is truth.
230506.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎹ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎹᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎹᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ.  ᎬᏩᏠᏯᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏍᎩ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏰᏃ ᎦᏱᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
230506.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-ma a-le gi-gv u-lu-hi-s-ta-nv-hi, hi-a Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv; v-tla a-ma-quo u-wa-sv, a-ma-s-gi-ni a-le gi-gv.  Gv-wa-tlo-ya-s-di a-le A-da-nv-do na-s-gi ka-no-he-s-gi, A-da-nv-do-ye-no ga-yi-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na.

230507.english: For there are three that bear record in heaven, the Father, the Word, and the Holy Ghost: and these three are one.
230507.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏦᎢᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ; ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏦᎢ ᎨᏒ ᏌᏉᏉ.
230507.phonetic: A-ni-tso-i-ye-no a-ni-no-he-s-gi ga-lv-la-di; A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, ka-no-he-dv, ga-lv-quo-di-yu-no a-da-nv-do; na-s-gi-no hi-a a-ni-tso-i ge-sv sa-quo-quo.

230508.english: And there are three that bear witness in earth, the spirit, and the water, and the blood: and these three agree in one.
230508.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏦᎢᏃ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎹ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎬ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂᏦᎢ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᎭ.
230508.phonetic: A-ni-tso-i-no a-ni-no-he-s-gi e-lo-hi, a-da-nv-do, a-ma, a-le gi-gv, na-s-gi-no hi-a a-ni-tso-i ge-sv u-tlo-yi a-ni-no-he-ha.

230509.english: If we receive the witness of men, the witness of God is greater: for this is the witness of God which he hath testified of his Son.
230509.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏗᏗᏂᏱᎭ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ.
230509.phonetic: I-yu-no yi-di-di-ni-yi-ha yv-wi u-ni-no-he-lv-hi, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-no-he-lv-hi u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu; hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-no-he-lv-hi, na-s-gi u-ne-i-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi U-we-tsi.

230510.english: He that believeth on the Son of God hath the witness in himself: he that believeth not God hath made him a liar; because he believeth not the record that God gave of his Son.
230510.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏪᎭ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏰᎪᏅ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵ ᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏃᎮᎸᎢ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
230510.phonetic: Go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi na-s-gi u-wa-sv ge-sv u-we-ha go-hi-yu-di-s-gi; U-ne-la-nv-hi go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-ye-go-nv, nv-di-ga-li s-do-di-ha ni-go-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-no-he-lv-i U-we-tsi u-ne-i-s-ta-nv-i.

230511.english: And this is the record, that God hath given to us eternal life, and this life is in his Son.
230511.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎧᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏁᎸ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230511.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi nu-s-di ka-no-he-lv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi i-gi-ne-lv wi-na-s-dv-na gv-ni-dv, a-le na-s-gi hi-a gv-ni-dv U-we-tsi u-tse-li-ga ge-sv-i.

230512.english: He that hath the Son hath life; and he that hath not the Son of God hath not life.
230512.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏪᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏪᎭ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏄᏪᎲᎾ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏪᎭ ᎬᏂᏛ.
230512.phonetic: Gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi u-we-hi, na-s-gi gv-ni-dv u-we-ha; U-ne-la-nv-hi-no U-we-tsi nu-we-hv-na v-tla yu-we-ha gv-ni-dv.

230513.english: These things have I written unto you that believe on the name of the Son of God; that ye may know that ye have eternal life, and that ye may believe on the name of the Son of God.
230513.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ.
230513.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di i-tsv-yo-we-la-si i-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gi du-do-v U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-tsi, i-tsa-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi gv-ni-dv i-tse-hv-i ge-sv-i, a-le i-tso-hi-yu-di-yi du-do-v U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-tsi.

230514.english: And this is the confidence that we have in him, that, if we ask any thing according to his will, he heareth us:
230514.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎡᏙᎢᏳᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏗᏔᏲᏏ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᎦᏛᎦᏁᎲᎢ.
230514.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi hi-a nu-s-di e-do-i-yu-sv-i, na-s-gi i-yu-no ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di e-di-ta-yo-si o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, i-ga-dv-ga-ne-hv-i.

230515.english: And if we know that he hear us, whatsoever we ask, we know that we have the petitions that we desired of him.
230515.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏱᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᎦᏛᏁᎲᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏗᏔᏲᏏ ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎰ ᎢᎩᏁᎲ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᏗᏔᏲᏎᎸᎢ.
230515.phonetic: I-yu-no yi-di-ga-ta-ha i-ga-dv-ne-hv-i, ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di e-di-ta-yo-si i-di-ga-ta-ho i-gi-ne-hv i-yu-s-di e-di-ta-yo-se-lv-i.

230516.english: If any man see his brother sin a sin which is not unto death, he shall ask, and he shall give him life for them that sin not unto death. There is a sin unto death: I do not say that he shall pray for it.
230516.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏳᎪᎲ ᏗᎾᏓᏅᏟ ᏳᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎬᏂᏛ ᏓᏰᏥᏁᎵ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎡᎭ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᎦᏗᎭ.
230516.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo yu-go-hv di-na-da-nv-tli yu-s-ga-nv-tsv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di a-le a-se gv-ni-dv da-ye-tsi-ne-li a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i.  E-ha a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tla a-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di na-s-gi a-tsi-do-li-s-di-yi yi-ga-di-ha.

230517.english: All unrighteousness is sin: and there is a sin not unto death.
230517.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ, ᎡᎭᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
230517.phonetic: Ni-ga-v du-yu-go-dv ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi a-s-ga-ni, e-ha-no a-s-ga-nv-i-s-di ge-sv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na.

230518.english: We know that whosoever is born of God sinneth not; but he that is begotten of God keepeth himself, and that wicked one toucheth him not.
230518.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏍᎦᏅᎪᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏕᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎫᏥᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏒᏂᎰᎢ.
230518.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha gi-lo U-ne-la-nv-hi u-de-ta-nv-hi tsi-ge-so-i v-tla ya-s-ga-nv-go-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-de-ta-nv-hi u-li-s-qua-ni-go-do-i, na-s-gi-no na u-ne-gu-tsi-dv v-tla yu-sv-ni-ho-i.

230519.english: And we know that we are of God, and the whole world lieth in wickedness.
230519.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᎦᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏃᏴᏨ ᎤᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ.
230519.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-ga-da-le-nv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le ni-gv-na-dv e-lo-hi u-no-yv-tsv u-yo ge-sv-i.

230520.english: And we know that the Son of God is come, and hath given us an understanding, that we may know him that is true, and we are in him that is true, even in his Son Jesus Christ. This is the true God, and eternal life.
230520.cherokee: ᎢᏗᎦᏔᎭᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᎷᏨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏁᎸ ᎢᎪᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏙᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏗᏯᎠ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎬᏂᏛ.
230520.phonetic: I-di-ga-ta-ha-no U-ne-la-nv-hi U-we-tsi u-lu-tsv-i, a-le i-gi-ne-lv i-go-li-s-di-yi, na-s-gi e-do-li-s-di-yi na-s-gi ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi; a-le na-s-gi e-di-ya-a ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi U-we-tsi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.  Na-s-gi hi-a u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le wi-na-s-dv-na gv-ni-dv.

230521.english: Little children, keep yourselves from idols. Amen.
